form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 11 m by Drink Up Drink Up (1:54.40) in OPEN on April 8 at $3.30. form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track, beaten 10 m by Drink Up Drink Up (1:54.40) in OPEN on April 8 at $12.50. Showed ability the run before when he posted a big 4.5 m win as favourite (Fr6) at Miami Valley Raceway (1:52.40) beating First Class Rule in NW16501L4 on April 1 at $2.90. Genuine contender.

form.formComment: Having his second run back from a spell. Solid effort when 2nd (Fr8) over 1609m at this track beaten 2.25 m by Drink Up Drink Up (1:54.40) in OPEN on April 8 at $24.30. Winning chance with plenty of scope for improvement.

form.formComment: Continued his steady form from last campaign first-up. Returned to racing with a won by a 0.8 m as favourite (Fr8) at Oak Grove Racing (1:52.30) beating Cecil Hanover in OPEN?HCP on March 31 at $2.12 Before going for a spell win at this track over 1609m OPEN. Reliable type who will be tough to beat this time.
